summary: Attempt 1 implements the central routing correction and most supporting controls, and targeted verification passes. The whole target remains incomplete because incident evidence lacks complete review/remediation budget objects, the real-preset regression does not execute the production workflow boundary, and replay uses a synthetic fixture instead of a production MoonMindRunWorkflow history.

testEvidence.targetedUnit: PASS: 546 Python tests; 1081 frontend tests passed with 238 skipped
testEvidence.composeIntegrationCi: NOT RUN: Docker builder lacks BuildKit RUN --mount support; advisory environment limitation
